---
title: "Shannon Rumsey"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.png
  links:
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/shannonrumsey
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shannon-rumsey/
---

My name is Shannon and I am an Undergraduate Researcher at the University of California, Santa Barbara. While I am well-versed in the world of data science, my specialty is in computational linguistics and natural language processing.
